productDisplayName: Reebok Men Chennai Super King Deo
description: Cheer your favourite cricket team with this Sports lifestyle reebok deodorant that is named after the Chennai Super Kings. This amazing fragrant sensation is designed for men and comes in a cylindrical bottle. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
